title: hieracium tomentosum subsp. phlomidifolium
intro: Hieracium tomentosum subsp. phlomidifolium is a subspecies of the tomentose hawkweed, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for wound healing and skin issues. The health benefits of Hieracium tomentosum subsp. phlomidifolium include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
